source: URLs sourced exclusively from each platform's own official catalog page. No third-party indexes, no community-maintained repositories, no pattern-extrapolated slugs. TryHackMe paths: tryhackme.com/paths. HackTheBox Academy: academy.hackthebox.com/catalogue. CyberDefenders: cyberdefenders.org/blueteam-ctf-challenges. SANS: sans.org/cyber-security-courses.
verification_note: This is the cleanup revision of the C2 seed. The original r3l-c2 seed included 376 entries sourced from community GitHub repositories (Hunterdii/TryHackMe-Roadmap for 186 TryHackMe rooms; adnan-kutay-yuksel/letsdefend-all-courses-database for 185 LetsDefend lessons) and 5 pattern-only Immersive Labs slugs that were not verified against the platform's actual catalog. Those entries have been purged in this revision per the project rule: training URLs must come from official platform sources, not third-party aggregators. The url_legitimacy CHECK constraint in training_modules remains as defense-in-depth; it is not the primary control. The primary control is "only insert URLs you obtained directly from the platform's own listing."

skills.name: AI Red Teaming and LLM Attacks

platforms.name: TryHackMe
platforms.description: Hands-on cybersecurity learning platform with browser-based labs covering offensive and defensive topics.

platforms.name: HackTheBox Academy
platforms.description: Structured cybersecurity courses with interactive sections, ranging from fundamentals through advanced offensive, defensive, purple-team, and AI security modules.

platforms.name: CyberDefenders
platforms.description: Blue team CTF challenges covering malware analysis, threat intel, network forensics, detection engineering, threat hunting, cloud forensics, and endpoint forensics.

platforms.name: SANS
platforms.description: Industry-leading cybersecurity training with paired GIAC certifications across offensive operations, cyber defense, DFIR, leadership, cloud, AI, and ICS security.

modules.title: TryHackMe Path: Pre Security
modules.description: Beginner-friendly intro to cybersecurity. Networking, Linux, Windows, and core concepts. Revamped February 2026.

modules.title: TryHackMe Path: Cyber Security 101
modules.description: Foundational path replacing the legacy Complete Beginner and Intro to Cyber Security paths.

modules.title: TryHackMe Path: SOC Level 1
modules.description: Defensive security path covering blue team fundamentals, phishing analysis, endpoint and network monitoring, SIEM, SOAR, threat intelligence, and web attack investigation. Revamped late 2025.

modules.title: TryHackMe Path: SOC Level 2
modules.description: Advanced security analyst path with technical skills to advance a SOC analyst career.

modules.title: TryHackMe Path: Jr Penetration Tester
modules.description: Core technical skills for junior penetration testing roles.

modules.title: TryHackMe Path: Red Teaming
modules.description: Adversary attack emulation as a Red Team Operator.

modules.title: TryHackMe Path: Defending Azure
modules.description: Learning path covering Microsoft Sentinel, KQL hunting, Defender XDR triage, Azure security challenges, and Microsoft Entra ID identity mapping. Launched April 2025.
